extraction_contract: Use the PDF/AIP section as the source of truth for expected values.
Extract field-value pairs exactly at the documentary field level shown by the AIP.
Do not split a documented field into semantic subfields such as meters/feet, Spanish/English variants, coordinates, phones or temperatures unless the source presents them as separate fields.
Use tables[] only when the source presents repeated rows/columns; table columns must be the documentary column headings.
Preserve NIL, No, blank/null cells and bilingual values as the cell or field value.

fields.label: Uso de senales ID de puestos de estacionamiento de aeronaves, lineas de guia TWY y sistema de guia visual a estacionamiento en los puestos de aeronaves / Use of aircraft stand ID signs, TWY guide lines and visual docking/parking guidance system at aircraft stands
Senales y LGT de RWY y TWY / RWY and TWY markings and LGT
fields.expected: Si, THR, Designadores de RWY, eje de RWY, Faja lateral de RWY, TDZ. Senales de Eje de TWY, borde TWY / Yes, THR, RWY Designators, RWY Axis, RWY Side Strip, TDZ. TWY Axis signals, TWY edge

fields.label: Barras de parada y luces de proteccion de RWY / Stop bars and RWY guard lights
Otras medidas de proteccion de RWY / Other runway protection measures
